Skip to contents
flowstate 0.16.1.9002
  • Reference
    • flowstate -- Structure

Write a flowstate as a Flow Cytometry Standard file (FCS 3.1)

Source: R/write_flowstate.R
write.flowstate.Rd

A flowstate – following Flow Cytometry Standard conventions – is converted to FCS 3.1 and written to disk. The conversion is as follows:

  • [['keywords']], [['parameters']], and [['spill']] (if present) are converted to character string using a delimiter "|" to separate keyword-value pairs.

    • this string forms the TEXT segment of the FCS file.

  • [['data']] is written as row-major binary.

    • this forms the DATA segment of the FCS file.

  • The HEADER segment (string) – containing the required offsets – is derived from TEXT and DATA.

The FCS 3.1 compliant file is then written to disk.

N.B.: During testing, FCS 3.1 files written to disk by write.flowstate were fully compatible with read.flowstate and flowCore::read.FCS; issues were only with proprietary software (i.e., FlowJo). If proprietary software is to be used with FCS 3.1 files generated by write.flowstate, caution is advised.

Usage

write.flowstate(
  flowstate,
  file.dir = tempdir(),
  fil.suffix = NULL,
  endianness = c("little", "big")
)

Arguments

flowstate

A flowstate as returned from read.flowstate.

file.dir

A file.path – default tempdir; a file directory for saving the output FCS 3.1 file(s).

fil.suffix

Character string – default NULL; if defined, the suffix will be appended

endianness

Character string – default "little"; see endian.

Value

  • FCS 3.1 file(s) are written to disk and a summary message is displayed.

    • the original $FIL will be appended with 'flowstateMOD' as an explicit indicator of modification; if fil.suffix is defined, 'flowstateMOD' will be further appended with the string value.

  • UPDATES BY REFERENCE:

    • flowstate[['data']] – non-numeric (logical and/or factor) columns are converted to numeric

    • flowstate[['keywords']] – non-character (factor) columns are converted to character

    • flowstate[['spill']] – column names are matched/updated using [['parameters']][['N']]

  • UPDATES BY ASSIGNMENT to environment:

    • flowstate[['parameters']] – [['parameters']] is updated by row-binding derived columns found in [['data']]

Invisibly returns flowstate.

Examples


fcs.file.paths <- system.file("extdata", package = "flowstate") |>
list.files(full.names = TRUE, pattern = "BLOCK.*.fcs")

## read .fcs files as a flowstate object; concatenate
fs <- read.flowstate(
  fcs.file.paths,
  colnames.type = "S",
  concatenate = TRUE
)
#> COVAIL_002_CYTOKINE_BLOCK1_1.fcs --> flowstate
#> COVAIL_002_CYTOKINE_BLOCK1_2.fcs --> flowstate
#> COVAIL_002_CYTOKINE_BLOCK1_3.fcs --> flowstate
#> Concatenating 'flowstates'...

## saturating events -- logical
select_nonsaturating(fs)

## singlet events -- logical
select_singlets(fs)

## transform
flowstate.transform(fs)
#> flowstate --> transforming...

## simple logical to select CD3+
fs$data[
,
j = select.CD3 := {
 d <- stats::density(CD3[(select.nonsaturating) & (select.singlets)])
 pv <- diff(sign(diff(d$y)))
 valley <- which(pv == 2) + 1
 CD3 > d$x[valley]
 }
]
#>        Time    SSC_W  SSC_H    SSC_A    FSC_W  FSC_H     FSC_A   SSCB_W SSCB_H
#>       <num>    <num>  <num>    <num>    <num>  <num>     <num>    <num>  <num>
#>    1:     0 730290.7 759933 924953.4 774044.6 997371 1286682.8 714389.4 873960
#>    2:     1 753766.8 453137 569266.0 714706.8 444274  529209.4 749070.4 411951
#>    3:     4 768520.5 599195 767489.4 729628.4 827274 1006004.3 730502.3 579392
#>    4:     4 707174.8 516909 609241.7 719956.1 819074  982828.9 700778.6 463030
#>    5:     5 743404.2 484976 600888.7 764667.1 754833  961993.2 726898.2 419073
#>   ---                                                                         
#> 5996:  2454 755967.8 529870 667607.8 752809.6 781192  980148.1 748563.8 386375
#> 5997:  2454 681458.6 362164 411332.9 704912.6 856891 1006722.2 675241.8 333285
#> 5998:  2455 677347.4 701711 792170.2 702094.4 810637  948572.9 668789.1 506809
#> 5999:  2455 696805.0 546994 635246.9 734241.6 960241 1175081.5 696149.9 465449
#> 6000:  2455 717597.9 481212 575527.9 713571.4 772944  919251.3 712120.8 452721
#>          SSCB_A     CD45RA    CD45RO       TCRgd     CD45BC1          IL2
#>           <num>      <num>     <num>       <num>       <num>        <num>
#>    1: 1040579.6  1.9602522 1.0533564  0.65068112  0.20973741 -0.546068006
#>    2:  514300.5  1.0537953 0.2130998  0.46825933  2.16524387  0.132831825
#>    3:  705412.0 -0.2470649 2.7199076  0.42499041  0.02931124  0.002875278
#>    4:  540802.5  0.6402557 1.0834556  1.47050773  2.52534304 -0.286119841
#>    5:  507705.7 -0.3323608 2.8483141  0.95952195  3.09759163 -0.127382318
#>   ---                                                                    
#> 5996:  482043.9  1.4767335 0.4264906  0.55609505  1.91829081 -0.221414160
#> 5997:  375079.9  1.9744866 0.4855015  0.63566630  2.78721332 -0.069965438
#> 5998:  564913.9  0.6691388 0.5834009  0.45495254 -0.20379971 -0.149373139
#> 5999:  540037.1  0.3137090 2.5537604 -1.05616639  2.59122142 -0.345124066
#> 6000:  537320.1  0.7515709 1.0826886  0.01604491  1.15698274 -0.388759405
#>               CD8     CD197      CD45BC2   CD45BC3       CD57       CD193
#>             <num>     <num>        <num>     <num>      <num>       <num>
#>    1:  4.47423555 0.3339797  2.325265211 2.1200846  0.4858091  0.33297371
#>    2:  0.05208613 2.0420686  1.802065427 0.7825755  0.7681877  0.03257206
#>    3: -0.07537308 0.1394232  0.221454119 2.1781596  0.5285062  0.18497058
#>    4:  0.22413649 0.3200305 -0.060624216 0.6324386  0.8329555  0.01681209
#>    5:  0.04736568 0.5260895 -0.181077517 0.9196392  1.2416150  0.03452835
#>   ---                                                                    
#> 5996:  3.25657085 1.1282877  2.573546353 1.6551860  0.7314523  0.08843720
#> 5997:  0.89578615 1.1070193 -0.020792172 0.6242733  0.5823043  0.06865744
#> 5998: -0.10649677 0.2172071 -0.007154095 1.5797494  1.1161867 -0.06789374
#> 5999:  3.78228758 0.1653123  0.816983086 1.6096684  0.3560706  0.11389195
#> 6000:  3.89311017 0.3112947  0.323274511 1.9627009 -0.1271375  0.16204775
#>          CD45BC4      CD127       CD56      CD199       CD49a GranzymeB
#>            <num>      <num>      <num>      <num>       <num>     <num>
#>    1: 2.25571508  0.2654731  1.0365955 0.26015922  0.21261395 3.0785197
#>    2: 0.08195645 -0.1281904  0.1969144 0.24933465  0.27731941 0.3867369
#>    3: 2.50902951  0.3982770 -0.3097284 0.36984053  0.10228633 0.4111196
#>    4: 2.53696619  0.6737886 -0.3552034 0.21008710  0.04358495 0.9020600
#>    5: 0.20317909  0.9920337  0.2890994 0.59912921 -0.15121887 0.3605579
#>   ---                                                                  
#> 5996: 0.14893465  0.2368386  0.3587825 0.30724193  0.05792273 0.3401447
#> 5997: 2.36004109  0.2004310  0.2651959 0.15327944  0.18236537 0.4410127
#> 5998: 1.53575739 -0.1055638  0.2869923 0.18433622  0.36100071 4.1810228
#> 5999: 0.28483815  0.2902687  0.5406996 0.01392175  0.24232233 0.4616495
#> 6000: 2.23598496  0.5944382 -0.4291759 0.24747923  0.23265734 0.2892711
#>            CD45BC5        CD95        CD3       CD4       CD69        TNFa
#>              <num>       <num>      <num>     <num>      <num>       <num>
#>    1: -0.001297575  0.18746983 2.69082752 1.2802729 0.84368803  0.19731991
#>    2: -0.022959761  0.54632690 0.01885507 0.1265832 0.18153395  0.13630370
#>    3:  1.833859938  0.18342249 2.37362055 3.0389426 0.33745353  0.16262134
#>    4:  2.083767364 -0.04675416 3.01898121 0.9824303 1.06530766  0.10870415
#>    5:  1.904147247  0.73400722 2.76351777 2.8095455 0.34187409  0.41362935
#>   ---                                                                     
#> 5996:  0.018050321  0.10407491 2.96421569 0.9984873 0.20297311  0.07247157
#> 5997:  0.169925098  0.25472133 0.22108311 0.5370170 0.81398521 -0.05947342
#> 5998: -0.056550341 -0.47791574 0.21997191 0.2438694 0.02834284  0.31989659
#> 5999:  0.051065304  0.03560712 2.23361417 0.8138703 0.60032416  0.94063443
#> 6000:  0.087254093  0.15002880 2.61817586 1.1960332 0.58147692  0.40816981
#>             CD183        IFNg        CD103     CD45BC6       CD122       ia4b7
#>             <num>       <num>        <num>       <num>       <num>       <num>
#>    1:  0.09448468 -0.05122809  0.033316724  0.16362894  0.14664735  0.86302787
#>    2: -0.09547814 -0.02191905 -0.004354057  1.62068087  0.14230851  0.28037717
#>    3: -0.08047263  0.07897691 -0.016781683  0.38182910 -0.34775417 -0.06421969
#>    4: -0.17537332 -0.03203706 -0.197617536  0.34049109 -0.09530003  0.09739852
#>    5: -0.59861754  0.00556097  0.031120678 -0.16426801 -0.13013797 -0.38354094
#>   ---                                                                         
#> 5996: -0.10381037  0.06009857 -0.066759366  0.06645741  0.02427680  0.24056226
#> 5997: -0.05725193  0.04123291 -0.048209601  2.08779599  0.11879013  0.50354839
#> 5998: -0.24981715 -0.26144068 -0.664655057  1.50539922  0.08400778  0.40524360
#> 5999: -0.15688068 -0.28882696 -0.007405709  0.17537962  0.02251314  0.03999534
#> 6000: -0.15752388 -0.23164842 -0.004791846  1.77689384  0.01874891  0.17845059
#>           CD45BC7  Viability        CD27        KLRG1
#>             <num>      <num>       <num>        <num>
#>    1:  0.20472459 0.28207831 -1.21213861  0.938003692
#>    2: -0.08181203 2.18518658  0.14843193  0.679568376
#>    3:  0.09550062 0.10841467 -0.08966891  1.299490619
#>    4: -0.18382007 0.20431878  0.06644138  1.760542679
#>    5:  1.83632802 0.15839596 -0.08930684  0.145310328
#>   ---                                                
#> 5996:  0.08948143 0.05401049  0.52100895 -0.003516618
#> 5997:  0.09389797 0.15050223 -0.15401834  0.161060456
#> 5998: -0.09233305 0.76145557 -0.08473685  0.208461477
#> 5999:  1.65542359 0.36379373 -0.28865046  0.619277393
#> 6000: -0.09068621 0.33323843 -0.41485464  0.886418310
#>                          sample.id select.nonsaturating select.singlets
#>                             <fctr>               <lgcl>          <lgcl>
#>    1: COVAIL_002_CYTOKINE_BLOCK1_1                 TRUE            TRUE
#>    2: COVAIL_002_CYTOKINE_BLOCK1_1                 TRUE            TRUE
#>    3: COVAIL_002_CYTOKINE_BLOCK1_1                 TRUE            TRUE
#>    4: COVAIL_002_CYTOKINE_BLOCK1_1                 TRUE            TRUE
#>    5: COVAIL_002_CYTOKINE_BLOCK1_1                 TRUE            TRUE
#>   ---                                                                  
#> 5996: COVAIL_002_CYTOKINE_BLOCK1_3                 TRUE            TRUE
#> 5997: COVAIL_002_CYTOKINE_BLOCK1_3                 TRUE            TRUE
#> 5998: COVAIL_002_CYTOKINE_BLOCK1_3                 TRUE            TRUE
#> 5999: COVAIL_002_CYTOKINE_BLOCK1_3                 TRUE            TRUE
#> 6000: COVAIL_002_CYTOKINE_BLOCK1_3                 TRUE            TRUE
#>       select.CD3
#>           <lgcl>
#>    1:       TRUE
#>    2:      FALSE
#>    3:       TRUE
#>    4:       TRUE
#>    5:       TRUE
#>   ---           
#> 5996:       TRUE
#> 5997:      FALSE
#> 5998:      FALSE
#> 5999:       TRUE
#> 6000:       TRUE

## add a factor -- 'aliquot'
fs$keywords[
 ,
 j = aliquot := data.table::tstrsplit(sample.id, "_", keep = 5, type.convert = factor)
]
#>          $BTIM   $CYT $CYTSN       $DATE       $ETIM
#>         <char> <char> <char>      <char>      <char>
#> 1: 09:22:51.62 Aurora  V0299 27-Feb-2025 09:33:47.32
#> 2: 09:38:12.18 Aurora  V0299 27-Feb-2025 09:49:40.92
#> 3: 09:50:46.94 Aurora  V0299 27-Feb-2025 10:03:26.16
#>                                $FIL $FLOWRATE    $INST          $LAST_MODIFIED
#>                              <char>    <char>   <char>                  <char>
#> 1: COVAIL_002_CYTOKINE_BLOCK1_1.fcs    Medium Cytekbio 15-JUL-2026 17:01:52.94
#> 2: COVAIL_002_CYTOKINE_BLOCK1_2.fcs    Medium Cytekbio 15-JUL-2026 17:01:53.02
#> 3: COVAIL_002_CYTOKINE_BLOCK1_3.fcs    Medium Cytekbio 15-JUL-2026 17:01:53.10
#>           $LAST_MODIFIER         $OP $ORIGINALITY   $PAR
#>                   <char>      <char>       <char> <char>
#> 1: flowstate_0.16.1.9002 aurora user DataModified     43
#> 2: flowstate_0.16.1.9002 aurora user DataModified     43
#> 3: flowstate_0.16.1.9002 aurora user DataModified     43
#>                             $PROJ $TIMESTEP   $TOT   $VOL APPLY COMPENSATION
#>                            <char>    <char> <char> <char>             <char>
#> 1: COVAIL_002_CYTOKINE_2025-02-27    0.0001   2000 326.86              FALSE
#> 2: COVAIL_002_CYTOKINE_2025-02-27    0.0001   2000 346.31              FALSE
#> 3: COVAIL_002_CYTOKINE_2025-02-27    0.0001   2000 350.19              FALSE
#>    CHARSET          CREATOR FSC ASF    GROUPNAME
#>     <char>           <char>  <char>       <char>
#> 1:   utf-8 SpectroFlo 3.3.0    1.26 BarcodedPool
#> 2:   utf-8 SpectroFlo 3.3.0    1.26 BarcodedPool
#> 3:   utf-8 SpectroFlo 3.3.0    1.26 BarcodedPool
#>                                    GUID LASER1ASF LASER1DELAY  LASER1NAME
#>                                  <char>    <char>      <char>      <char>
#> 1: 0fffcae2-2163-49f9-98a3-8f17bb4ecc13      1.14       -41.7 YellowGreen
#> 2: 6ff1ded1-96f6-4784-8a70-3cbef2e01427      1.14       -41.7 YellowGreen
#> 3: 2c9682b4-473f-4375-a851-48f9f2fe3bf7      1.14       -41.7 YellowGreen
#>    LASER2ASF LASER2DELAY LASER2NAME LASER3ASF LASER3DELAY LASER3NAME LASER4ASF
#>       <char>      <char>     <char>    <char>      <char>     <char>    <char>
#> 1:      1.26     -20.375     Violet      1.18           0       Blue      1.14
#> 2:      1.26     -20.375     Violet      1.18           0       Blue      1.14
#> 3:      1.26     -20.375     Violet      1.18           0       Blue      1.14
#>    LASER4DELAY LASER4NAME LASER5ASF LASER5DELAY LASER5NAME
#>         <char>     <char>    <char>      <char>     <char>
#> 1:      20.675        Red      1.08      41.675         UV
#> 2:      20.675        Red      1.08      41.675         UV
#> 3:      20.675        Red      1.08      41.675         UV
#>                     THRESHOLD                     TUBENAME  USERSETTINGNAME
#>                        <char>                       <char>           <char>
#> 1: (FSC,150000)And(SSC,75000) COVAIL_002_CYTOKINE_BLOCK1_1 *COVAIL_CYTOKINE
#> 2: (FSC,150000)And(SSC,75000) COVAIL_002_CYTOKINE_BLOCK1_2 *COVAIL_CYTOKINE
#> 3: (FSC,150000)And(SSC,75000) COVAIL_002_CYTOKINE_BLOCK1_3 *COVAIL_CYTOKINE
#>    WINDOW EXTENSION                    sample.id aliquot
#>              <char>                       <fctr>  <fctr>
#> 1:                3 COVAIL_002_CYTOKINE_BLOCK1_1       1
#> 2:                3 COVAIL_002_CYTOKINE_BLOCK1_2       2
#> 3:                3 COVAIL_002_CYTOKINE_BLOCK1_3       3

add.keywords.to.data(fs, 'aliquot')

## write; reassign to capture the updated flowstate
fs <- write.flowstate(fs, fil.suffix = "Example")
#> flowstate --> /tmp/Rtmpp8nLj5/COVAIL_002_CYTOKINE_BLOCK1_1_flowstateMOD_Example.fcs
#> flowstate --> /tmp/Rtmpp8nLj5/COVAIL_002_CYTOKINE_BLOCK1_2_flowstateMOD_Example.fcs
#> flowstate --> /tmp/Rtmpp8nLj5/COVAIL_002_CYTOKINE_BLOCK1_3_flowstateMOD_Example.fcs

## read newly written files
fcs.file.paths <- list.files(
 tempdir(),
 full.names = TRUE,
 pattern = "flowstateMOD_Example.fcs"
)

fs <- read.flowstate(
  fcs.file.paths,
  colnames.type = "S",
  concatenate = TRUE
)
#> COVAIL_002_CYTOKINE_BLOCK1_1_flowstateMOD_Example.fcs --> flowstate
#> COVAIL_002_CYTOKINE_BLOCK1_2_flowstateMOD_Example.fcs --> flowstate
#> COVAIL_002_CYTOKINE_BLOCK1_3_flowstateMOD_Example.fcs --> flowstate
#> Concatenating 'flowstates'...

## derived [['data']] columns
fs[['data']][, .(select.nonsaturating, select.singlets, select.CD3, aliquot)]
#>       select.nonsaturating select.singlets select.CD3 aliquot
#>                      <num>           <num>      <num>   <num>
#>    1:                    1               1          1       1
#>    2:                    1               1          0       1
#>    3:                    1               1          1       1
#>    4:                    1               1          1       1
#>    5:                    1               1          1       1
#>   ---                                                        
#> 5996:                    1               1          1       3
#> 5997:                    1               1          0       3
#> 5998:                    1               1          0       3
#> 5999:                    1               1          1       3
#> 6000:                    1               1          1       3

## derived [['parameters']] columns
fs$parameters[grep("Logical|Factor", TYPE)]
#>       par      B DISPLAY      E                    N      R      S
#>    <char> <char>  <char> <char>               <char> <char> <char>
#> 1:   $P44     32     LIN    0,0 select.nonsaturating      1   <NA>
#> 2:   $P45     32     LIN    0,0      select.singlets      1   <NA>
#> 3:   $P46     32     LIN    0,0           select.CD3      1   <NA>
#> 4:   $P47     32     LIN    0,0              aliquot      3   <NA>
#>               TYPE      V
#>             <char> <char>
#> 1: Derived_Logical   <NA>
#> 2: Derived_Logical   <NA>
#> 3: Derived_Logical   <NA>
#> 4:  Derived_Factor   <NA>

## derived [['keyword']] columns -- retains original factor levels
fs[['keywords']][, .(aliquot)]
#>          aliquot
#>           <char>
#> 1: FACTOR::1;2;3
#> 2: FACTOR::1;2;3
#> 3: FACTOR::1;2;3
## recover the factor levels -- optional
levels.aliquot <- unique(fs[['keywords']][, sub('FACTOR::', "", aliquot)])
levels.aliquot <- strsplit(levels.aliquot, ';')[[1]]
fs$keywords[, aliquot := factor(levels.aliquot)]
#>          $BTIM   $CYT $CYTSN       $DATE       $ETIM
#>         <char> <char> <char>      <char>      <char>
#> 1: 09:22:51.62 Aurora  V0299 27-Feb-2025 09:33:47.32
#> 2: 09:38:12.18 Aurora  V0299 27-Feb-2025 09:49:40.92
#> 3: 09:50:46.94 Aurora  V0299 27-Feb-2025 10:03:26.16
#>                                                     $FIL $FLOWRATE    $INST
#>                                                   <char>    <char>   <char>
#> 1: COVAIL_002_CYTOKINE_BLOCK1_1_flowstateMOD_Example.fcs    Medium Cytekbio
#> 2: COVAIL_002_CYTOKINE_BLOCK1_2_flowstateMOD_Example.fcs    Medium Cytekbio
#> 3: COVAIL_002_CYTOKINE_BLOCK1_3_flowstateMOD_Example.fcs    Medium Cytekbio
#>             $LAST_MODIFIED        $LAST_MODIFIER         $OP $ORIGINALITY
#>                     <char>                <char>      <char>       <char>
#> 1: 15-JUL-2026 17:01:53.38 flowstate_0.16.1.9002 aurora user DataModified
#> 2: 15-JUL-2026 17:01:53.48 flowstate_0.16.1.9002 aurora user DataModified
#> 3: 15-JUL-2026 17:01:53.58 flowstate_0.16.1.9002 aurora user DataModified
#>      $PAR                          $PROJ $TIMESTEP   $TOT   $VOL
#>    <char>                         <char>    <char> <char> <char>
#> 1:     47 COVAIL_002_CYTOKINE_2025-02-27    0.0001   2000 326.86
#> 2:     47 COVAIL_002_CYTOKINE_2025-02-27    0.0001   2000 346.31
#> 3:     47 COVAIL_002_CYTOKINE_2025-02-27    0.0001   2000 350.19
#>    APPLY COMPENSATION CHARSET          CREATOR FSC ASF    GROUPNAME
#>                <char>  <char>           <char>  <char>       <char>
#> 1:              FALSE   utf-8 SpectroFlo 3.3.0    1.26 BarcodedPool
#> 2:              FALSE   utf-8 SpectroFlo 3.3.0    1.26 BarcodedPool
#> 3:              FALSE   utf-8 SpectroFlo 3.3.0    1.26 BarcodedPool
#>                                    GUID LASER1ASF LASER1DELAY  LASER1NAME
#>                                  <char>    <char>      <char>      <char>
#> 1: 0fffcae2-2163-49f9-98a3-8f17bb4ecc13      1.14       -41.7 YellowGreen
#> 2: 6ff1ded1-96f6-4784-8a70-3cbef2e01427      1.14       -41.7 YellowGreen
#> 3: 2c9682b4-473f-4375-a851-48f9f2fe3bf7      1.14       -41.7 YellowGreen
#>    LASER2ASF LASER2DELAY LASER2NAME LASER3ASF LASER3DELAY LASER3NAME LASER4ASF
#>       <char>      <char>     <char>    <char>      <char>     <char>    <char>
#> 1:      1.26     -20.375     Violet      1.18           0       Blue      1.14
#> 2:      1.26     -20.375     Violet      1.18           0       Blue      1.14
#> 3:      1.26     -20.375     Violet      1.18           0       Blue      1.14

#> 1:      20.675        Red      1.08      41.675         UV
#> 2:      20.675        Red      1.08      41.675         UV
#> 3:      20.675        Red      1.08      41.675         UV
#>                     THRESHOLD                     TUBENAME  USERSETTINGNAME
#>                        <char>                       <char>           <char>
#> 1: (FSC,150000)And(SSC,75000) COVAIL_002_CYTOKINE_BLOCK1_1 *COVAIL_CYTOKINE
#> 2: (FSC,150000)And(SSC,75000) COVAIL_002_CYTOKINE_BLOCK1_2 *COVAIL_CYTOKINE
#> 3: (FSC,150000)And(SSC,75000) COVAIL_002_CYTOKINE_BLOCK1_3 *COVAIL_CYTOKINE
#>    WINDOW EXTENSION aliquot                    sample.id
#>              <char>  <fctr>                       <fctr>
#> 1:                3       1 COVAIL_002_CYTOKINE_BLOCK1_1
#> 2:                3       2 COVAIL_002_CYTOKINE_BLOCK1_2
#> 3:                3       3 COVAIL_002_CYTOKINE_BLOCK1_3
fs$data[, aliquot := NULL]

#>       select.singlets select.CD3                    sample.id
#>                 <num>      <num>                       <fctr>
#>    1:               1          1 COVAIL_002_CYTOKINE_BLOCK1_1
#>    2:               1          0 COVAIL_002_CYTOKINE_BLOCK1_1
#>    3:               1          1 COVAIL_002_CYTOKINE_BLOCK1_1
#>    4:               1          1 COVAIL_002_CYTOKINE_BLOCK1_1
#>    5:               1          1 COVAIL_002_CYTOKINE_BLOCK1_1
#>   ---                                                        
#> 5996:               1          1 COVAIL_002_CYTOKINE_BLOCK1_3
#> 5997:               1          0 COVAIL_002_CYTOKINE_BLOCK1_3
#> 5998:               1          0 COVAIL_002_CYTOKINE_BLOCK1_3
#> 5999:               1          1 COVAIL_002_CYTOKINE_BLOCK1_3
#> 6000:               1          1 COVAIL_002_CYTOKINE_BLOCK1_3
add.keywords.to.data(fs, 'aliquot')

## plot derived [['data']] logicals (now numeric)
plot(fs, FSC_A, FSC_H) + ggplot2::facet_wrap(~select.singlets)
#> Warning: Computation failed in `stat_binhex()`.
#> Caused by error in `compute_group()`:
#> ! The package "hexbin" is required for `stat_bin_hex()`.
#> Warning: Computation failed in `stat_binhex()`.
#> Caused by error in `compute_group()`:
#> ! The package "hexbin" is required for `stat_bin_hex()`.

flowstate.transform(fs)
#> flowstate --> transforming...
plot(fs, CD3) + ggplot2::facet_wrap(~select.CD3)
